message:
Add client module and error boundaries

New client system (fastmcp-console):
- client.rs: MCP client implementation
- client/traffic.rs: Traffic monitoring and analysis
- Error boundary pattern for graceful failures
- Snapshot testing utilities

Improvements:
- Enhanced diagnostics
- Better logging integration
- Status reporting refinements
- Comprehensive test snapshots

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+//! Error handling utilities with automatic rich display.
+//!
+//! This module provides the [`ErrorBoundary`] type that wraps operations
+//! and automatically displays errors beautifully on failure using the
+//! configured console and theme.
+
+mod boundary;
+
+pub use boundary::ErrorBoundary;
